title: Favorite scenes SPOILERS
wikitext:
[]: Favorite scenes (SPOILERS)             Quote Post by ehh123 » Wed Apr 28, 2010 11:00 am So far, what has been your favorite scene that is completely new or altered so from the original scene so much that it might as well be a new scene? I mean scenes like the visit to the aquarium.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Wed Apr 28, 2010 1:55 pm Okay.1:Are you talking about 1.0 or 2.0 or both?And 2:You forgot spoilers. Anyway,my favorite has to be Unit 01 going into God mode against Zeruel.Personally,that's my favorite scene out of the whole movie.

[]:             Quote Post by ehh123 » Wed Apr 28, 2010 2:13 pm Eva 04 wrote: Okay.1:Are you talking about 1.0 or 2.0 or both?

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Wed Apr 28, 2010 2:27 pm Hmm, i think i will be mainly talking about 2.0: - The Sahaquiel battle: gorgeous. Best battle scene in the movie, IMHO. Funnily enough, it reuses a lot of shots and cuts from the original, but the way it was redone is mind blowing. Can't wait to see it in HD. - I would have loved the redone elevator scene between Asuka and Rei better, IF the topic of conversation didn't switch back to Shinji so rapidly. Yin and Yang finally interacting with each other for real, developing their characters by the way they clash so clearly. But it was still nice to see Rei stopping Asuka mid-rage, while Asuka managed to finally get Rei to talk about her feelings. Was nice. - The Ayanami rescue scene is awesome (the God Mode Unit-01 vs. Zeruel beatdown that precedes it sucks nuts, at least for me). Beautiful, trippy, and sprinkled with enough irony to make it more than a simple "I shall pry you from the jaws of the Abyss, my love!" type of nosense. Kaworu lancing Unit-01 is the cherry on that cake. - I absolutely love the reimagined version of the "Asuka gets into Shinji's bed" scene. Even more so the part where Asuka is depicted as being restless on her own. The composition in that one is so good. She looks like a lonesome, isolated message in a bottle on the sea of that cold, empty bed (man, i'm getting mushy). They captured the image of solitude and vulnerability so well.... only to nearly ruin it with "Shimapan time!" fanservice. Bleh. A love/hate scene. - Asuka/Misato interaction scenes: warmer, friendlier, more like sisters having girly time, and screw you guys, it's just plain cute. Damn that Kaji and his ruinous smarm.

[]:             Quote Post by NatTheWriter » Wed Apr 28, 2010 5:06 pm The battles against Ramiel and Sahaquiel, the "give Ayanami back" scene, and...well, I'm inordinately fond of how they shrunk episode 4 to fit 1.0 . I can't quite say why. ._.' The way it was handled, the composition... Ah, and the music . xD

[]:             Quote Post by mysterysax » Wed Apr 28, 2010 5:27 pm Shinji saving Rei from her damaged Eva in 1.0. The whole scene redone in stunning digital design will always be my favorite!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Apr 29, 2010 4:36 am This thread might as well be "What's your favorite scene?", without the "new/altered" qualifier... 1.0 is mostly pretty blah for me, but Operation Yashima justifies its existence. Highlight for me is where Ramiel is blasting Eva-00's ESV -- and then Eva-00 herself. Intense... (Then Ramiel goes out with a girly shriek and eventually collapses into the blood-like remains of its own body. Wow.) 2.0, I still need to see in non-shit quality. I only watched the whole camrip once, without subtitles, and that was so painful I never bothered to do it WITH subtitles. But I watch the cooler scenes a lot. I'm not going to be terribly original with my favorites: the Sahaquiel run, and all that weird shit in the final 20 or so minutes. (Though, during the finale, I skip the Shinji/Rei stuff. The combination of profuse Shinji grunting and apocalyptic WAFF just doesn't turn me on.)

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Thu Apr 29, 2010 5:23 am Asuka's new introductory scene gave me goosebumps. However short it was it was definitely the most excited I got throughout the entirety of 2.0. As for 1.0... I dunno... umm.... Misato showing lilith to Shinji. Thats new right?

[]:             Quote Post by KaaVI » Thu Apr 29, 2010 7:39 am The updated Ramiel with the shapeshifting and the girly shrieks as well as the epic blood spatter internally, i think the fire could have been updated however. Nekkid Kaworu! The update to Matarael in the pendulum form vs Unit 02 was a short but awesome battle. Nekkid Kaworu on the moon! Obviously the unit 02 Going "Bisto" against Zeruel with the intensifying music (The Beast) . Rei's intervention was also a better touch without a coffee can but inserted an actual N2 missile. And of course More Kaworu! "I WILL MAKE YOU HAPPY!"

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Apr 29, 2010 2:05 pm I only watched 2.0 once, but here's 1.0 to start: -Shinji wandering around the city after running away. Especially Shinji at the "suicide spot" through the scene of him at the bridge... No matter where he goes, he just can't escape Nerv. -Rei & Shinji chat in the sick room. The lighting, framing, Rei looking sad/hurt after she says she'll participate in the battle alone and Shinji calling after her... I just love the interaction between them. -Meeting Lilith. I liked the fact Lilith DOES seem to be Lilith instead of nobody really knowing who she is this time around... And the "moment" between Misato and Shinji was nice, too. -Operation Yashima. The whole sequence is just beyond epic. 2.0: -Mari and Eva-05 vs 3rd Angel. It was a great way to introduce Mari as well as an amazing battle, considering how Mari may be a gung-ho pilot but that doesn't mean she has natural talent or life-long training like say, Shinji or Asuka. -8th Angel battle: It's just epic. Bonus points for the 3 pilots working together. I love how what was more or less an action sequence in the original series became extremely dramatic and dead-serious in Rebuild. (Yeah, the possibility of everybody dying was in both of course, it's just the actual battles were executed differently.) -Asuka/Shinji bedroom scene. Subversions of episode 9 are always good. -Asuka/Rei elevator scene. The starting discussion from 22' to 2.0 being inversed (from mainly Eva talk to mainly Shinji talk) still takes getting used to. -Asuka/Misato talking before Eva-03. I love the fact they get along more in the film series, and the discussion itself was heartwarming. -Last 30 minutes of the film are nothing short of WTF-inducing mixed with EPIC. And the irony of Operation Rescue Ayanami is great. >=3

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Thu Apr 29, 2010 4:37 pm 1.0 -Lilith... The mistery goes on... What's the lance doing there already /:o ? (Agree in most things with Sailor Star Dust) -The whole "Angel of doom" BGM scene 2.0 -Mari, definitely the weird/4-eyed/kickass-pilot/hijacker/parachuter/spy(?)/british gal... The best thing so far in Rebuild, could move Asuka from the favourite Eva character slot. -Mari taking 02 into Beast mode (by the way, does anyona know *exactly* what she said before releasing it? just after she accomodates her glasses...) -The 3.0 trailer!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Apr 30, 2010 8:41 am @Arael: Mari is a scene? Maybe figuratively, but...... And you never picked up the subtitles that were released here? You can find those somewhere toward the tail end of the translation thread. But here's basically what's being said in that particular scene. @KaaVi: What's this about Eva-02 going Bisto ? And Clockiel = Rebuild of Matarael? No. Just... no. (One hissyfit Rei per post is more than enough, for the future.)

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Fri Apr 30, 2010 8:59 am Reichu wrote: @KaaVi: What's this about Eva-02 going Bisto ? And Clockiel = Rebuild of Matarael? No. Just... no.

[]:             Quote Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Fri Apr 30, 2010 9:15 am Zeruel's fight, 'nough said 'cause it was actiony and explosive and stuff.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Apr 30, 2010 9:34 am skikes wrote: I'm actually under the same impression. I think when, if ever the angel names are revealed clockiel will be matarael and boniel will be an experimented on gaghiel or sandalphon.

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Fri Apr 30, 2010 9:56 am Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion wrote: Zeruel's fight, 'nough said 'cause it was actiony and explosive and stuff.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Fri Apr 30, 2010 4:40 pm Reichu: yeah, Mari in the scenes where she is weird, british and 4 eyed (that is, all of her scenes); when she kicks-ass (that is, battle in Aqueront and with unit 02) and when hijacks and parachute lands on Shinji... By the way I meant what she says IN Japanese [sorry, my bad]. I just can't figure it out: As far as I've heard モード // 反転、 // 裏 // コード、 // ザ・ビース ト！ mo-do // (?) // (?) // ko-do // Ze be-su-to! Mode // Invert // Secret // code // "The Beast"! How are the "?" pronounced ?

[]:             Quote Post by Hatsumi92 » Fri Apr 30, 2010 5:09 pm Hey now, Mari speaking in english was absolutely hilarious and amazing. and what do you mean by "4 eyed", because she wears glasses?

[]:             Quote Post by yourmom » Sat May 01, 2010 9:34 am Personally, I really liked what they did with the Eva 03 scene. In the original, I always felt it was really drawn out, with the Evas being spread out so that each of them are essentially left alone with the angel, apparently just for plot purposes. The infected unit taking out both Asuka and Rei one by one, with Asuka getting conveniently clocked mid-sentence and Rei apparently not even bothering to at least try and disable a limb or something, even though they'll have to stop the unit somehow anyway. And then Shinji is left to endlessly whine by himself with no one backing him up. In the rebuild it's just Shinji by himself from the beginning, and it happens so fast that he doesn't really even have time to do anything but decide that he'd rather die than (directly) kill someone else. It just works so much better for me ._.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat May 01, 2010 9:48 am I have not seen 2.0 yet, so I'm going to have to say that everything featured in Angel of Doom, particularly Misato's dialogue to Gendo and Shinji when shit goes down.
